description: Rise of Avalon Patch 13 (Balance Patch) (2 February 2021) — Use-All Button Added, Avalonian Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Other Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Use-All Button Added

subsections.heading: Use All Button

items.text: Stacks of Silver Bags will be consumed instantly and grant you the full amount of Silver
Tomes of Insight and chests use a channeled spell, meaning the items are still consumed individually and the channel can be canceled at any point.
The following items now have a "Use All" option

subitems.text: All Reward Chests (will display an additional window showing accumulated loot): Adventurer's Challenge Chests, Crystal League Chests, etc.

subsections.searchable_text: Use All Button Stacks of Silver Bags will be consumed instantly and grant you the full amount of Silver Tomes of Insight and chests use a channeled spell, meaning the items are still consumed individually and the channel can be canceled at any point. The following items now have a "Use All" option All Silver Bags All Tomes of Insight All Reward Chests (will display an additional window showing accumulated loot): Adventurer's Challenge Chests, Crystal League Chests, etc.

The following items now have a "Use All" option

sections.heading: Avalonian Changes

subsections.heading: Overall Avalonian Changes:

items.text: Many high-damage Avalonian mob spells can no longer be reflected

subsections.searchable_text: Overall Avalonian Changes: Many high-damage Avalonian mob spells can no longer be reflected

subsections.heading: Lesser Avalonian Mob Changes:

items.text: Avalonian Shield reflects damage only every 0.3 seconds
Drones will switch targets when they exceed a certain distance from their assembler

subitems.text: Now has a higher chance of striking targets

items.text: Attack range increased to match reset range

subsections.searchable_text: Lesser Avalonian Mob Changes: Avalonian Shield reflects damage only every 0.3 seconds Drones will switch targets when they exceed a certain distance from their assembler Helix Shot Now has a higher chance of striking targets Cooldown: 22s → 18s Attack range increased to match reset range

subsections.heading: Avalonian Boss Changes:

items.text: Momentum (the buff the Construct receives from each auto-attack)
Colossal Swipe no longer has a blind spot, meaning you can no longer avoid the swipe by standing close to the Construct

subitems.text: Damage now based on total Compensator Energy Status stacks
Damage now based on total Compensator Energy Status stacks

items.text: Shadow summons introduce their more dangerous abilities later in the fight

subitems.text: Areas now spawn closer to the High Priestess
Now only summons Tainted Shadows for players within a Divine Offering area
Now also stacks a buff, Divine Righteousness, on the High Priestess for each player not within a Divine Offering area
Divine Righteousness increases the Priestess' auto attack damage, grants her healing over time, and is stackable

items.text: Divine Crystal Resonance now deals damage in a 3m radius around every target hit
Cleanse now also applies Holy Flames
Avalonian Barrier reflects damage only once every 0.3 seconds
Avalonian Bulwark reflects damage only once every 0.3 seconds
Sir Bedivere will drop his current target if it moves too far away

subitems.text: Damage effect no longer removed immediately after leaving the aura's area of effect
Spawn position is now less predictable

subsections.heading: Avalonian Mob Fixes:

items.text: Fixed missing spell icon for Construct's swing attack

subsections.searchable_text: Avalonian Mob Fixes: Fixed Sir Bedivere's boss "ring" visual Fixed missing spell icon for Construct's swing attack

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Axes

subitems.text: Hitting at least one enemy player decreases the ability's cooldown by 40%

subsections.searchable_text: Axes Rending Spin (all Axes) Max Damage: 75 → 68 Morgana Raven (Carrioncaller) Cooldown: 16s → 18s Razor Cut (Bearpaws) Jump Time: 0.83s → 0.55s Jump Range: 15m → 12m Instant Damage: 160 → 140 Hitting at least one enemy player decreases the ability's cooldown by 40%

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs

subitems.text: Reworked hit detection: it is now an instant explosion and no longer freezes enemies who touch the area after the initial teleportation

subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Frost Nova (all Frost Staffs) Reworked hit detection: it is now an instant explosion and no longer freezes enemies who touch the area after the initial teleportation Damage: 85.80 → 70 Stun Duration: 1.26s → 1s

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Iron Breaker (all Hammers) Resistance Reduction: 0.2 → 0.17 Groundbreaker (Polehammer) Stun Duration: 2.85s → 2.5s Grasp of the Undead (Tombhammer) Cast Range: 16m → 12m Stun Duration: 2.9s → 2.48s

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Divine Intervention (Hallowfall) Resistance Buff Duration: 7s → 4s

subsections.heading: Maces

items.text: Added the new ability Guard Rune: Creates a rune on the ground that increases resistances by 0.2 and healing received by 25% for up to 5 allies. Rune has a 5m radius and lasts for 5s. Ability is interruptible.
Heavy Slam (all Maces) - reworked the ability; it is now called Ground Shaker

subitems.text: The area is now a 4m circle in front of the caster
The ability now also knocks enemies in the air

subsections.searchable_text: Maces Removed the ability Interrupt (all Maces) Added the new ability Guard Rune: Creates a rune on the ground that increases resistances by 0.2 and healing received by 25% for up to 5 allies. Rune has a 5m radius and lasts for 5s. Ability is interruptible. Snare Charge (all Maces) Jump Time: 0.55s → 0.44s Standtime: 0.5s → 0.4s Heavy Slam (all Maces) - reworked the ability; it is now called Ground Shaker The area is now a 4m circle in front of the caster The ability now also knocks enemies in the air Cooldown: 15s → 10s Damage: 271.95 → 200 Cast Time: 1s → 0.7s Hit Delay: 0.5s → 0s Standtime: 1s → 0.4s Energy Cost: 14 → 10

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs

subitems.text: Delay before the first tick of the channel: 0.5s → 0s

stats.name: Delay before the first tick of the channel

subitems.text: The slow is now applied as long as enemies are inside the aura (independent of their CC resistance)

subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Thorns (all Nature Staffs) Additional Autoattack Damage vs Players: 56 → 40 Additional Autoattack Damage vs Mobs: 56 → 64 No longer reflects damage Spiritual Seed (Druidic Staff) Cooldown: 25s → 20s Ruthless Nature (Blight Staff) Delay before the first tick of the channel: 0.5s → 0s The slow is now applied as long as enemies are inside the aura (independent of their CC resistance) Heal per Second: 33 → 39

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs

subitems.text: Removed delay before rooting effect; root area is now instantly active after the hit

subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Soul Shaker (Grailseeker) Removed delay before rooting effect; root area is now instantly active after the hit Mystic Rocks (Staff of Balance) Resistance Increase: 0.10 → 0.20

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Splitting Slash (all Swords) Hit Delay: 0.6s → 0.3s Standtime: 0.8s → 0.5s Mighty Blow (Broadsword) Resistance Increase: 0.24 → 0.18 Standtime: 0.8s → 0.3s Jump Time: 0.43s → 0.33s

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Force Shield (Judicator Armor) Resistance increase: 0.32 → 0.28 Requite (Armor of Valor) Reflected Damage: 50 → 46

subsections.heading: Helmets

items.text: Reworked Emergency Heal (Guardian Helmet); it is now called Emergency Shield

subitems.text: Removed the Healing; instead it now applies a shield that absorbs 400 base damage and lasts for 3s (Damage over Time effects are still removed after the rework)

subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Reworked Emergency Heal (Guardian Helmet); it is now called Emergency Shield Removed the Healing; instead it now applies a shield that absorbs 400 base damage and lasts for 3s (Damage over Time effects are still removed after the rework) Radius: 4m → 5m Cooldown: 40s → 30s Energy Shield (Scholar Cowl) Duration: 8s → 5s Energy Gain on hit: 13.14 → 16

subsections.heading: Shoes

subitems.text: No longer applies a shield in a small AoE radius; instead the shield is now applied to the caster and target (if target is an ally)

subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Shield Charge (Knight Boots) No longer applies a shield in a small AoE radius; instead the shield is now applied to the caster and target (if target is an ally) Shield Strength: 200 → 350 Dash Speed: 25 m/s → 35 m/s

subsections.heading: Capes

subitems.text: No longer counts as damage over time, so its effect cannot be removed by Emergency Shield

subsections.searchable_text: Capes Opening to Hell (Demon Cape) No longer counts as damage over time, so its effect cannot be removed by Emergency Shield Damage vs Players: 60 → 50

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Hideouts can now only be set as "Home" when owned by your current guild, OR when they are Level 3 Hideouts owned by a currently allied guild. This includes houses and guild halls inside Hideouts. For more information about this change and the reasons behind it, see this post: forum.albiononline.com/index.php/Thread/143364
Guild Season 10 winner statues are now placeable furniture items
Attack damage of all Cougars reduced by 44% to bring them in line with similar mobs
Morgana Ravens in Tier 4 Randomized Morgana Group Dungeons are now Tier 4 instead of Tier 6
[MOBILE] Updated Settings UI on mobile (replacing dropdowns with sliders, etc.)
[MOBILE] Added minimap opacity option; minimap is now semi-transparent by default on mobile

sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Hideouts can now only be set as "Home" when owned by your current guild, OR when they are Level 3 Hideouts owned by a currently allied guild. This includes houses and guild halls inside Hideouts. For more information about this change and the reasons behind it, see this post: forum.albiononline.com/index.php/Thread/143364 Guild Season 10 winner statues are now placeable furniture items Attack damage of all Cougars reduced by 44% to bring them in line with similar mobs Morgana Ravens in Tier 4 Randomized Morgana Group Dungeons are now Tier 4 instead of Tier 6 [MOBILE] Updated Settings UI on mobile (replacing dropdowns with sliders, etc.) [MOBILE] Added minimap opacity option; minimap is now semi-transparent by default on mobile

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Fixed an issue where Estimated Market Value would display incorrect values
Political View is once again available on the World Map
The heal on hit effect of Blessed Aurora (Oathkeepers) can now be purged as intended
Rending Rage (Axes) tooltip now displays the correct 7m leap distance
[MOBILE] Fixed an issue where mobile clients would disconnect during long loading screens
[MOBILE] Spells that can target either self or others now allow double tapping to cast on self, even if another target is selected
Numerous additional graphical, animation, audio, terrain, and localization fixes
